name: Holiday Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat together the softened butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs to the butter mixture one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually blend in the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just combined.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts and chocolate chips (if using).
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 minutes or until golden brown.
Note: Be sure to turn off the oven when finished baking.
